allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('src/App.jsx','utf8'\); const issues = []; if \(!content.includes\('AdminDashboard'\)\) issues.push\('AdminDashboard missing'\); if \(!content.includes\('Impact'\)\) issues.push\('Impact missing'\); if \(!content.includes\('SystemFlow'\)\) issues.push\('SystemFlow missing'\); if \(!content.includes\('FinalCTA'\)\) issues.push\('FinalCTA missing'\); if \(!content.includes\('db-shell'\)\) issues.push\('db-shell missing'\); if \(issues.length\) console.log\('ISSUES:', issues\); else console.log\('All sections present'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const css = fs.readFileSync\('src/index.css','utf8'\); const checks = ['.db-shell','.db-kpis','.db-bars','.db-log','.impact-kpis','.impact-grid','.impact-tag','.flow-diagram','.flow-node','.final-cta-section','.hero-stats-note']; const missing = checks.filter\(c => !css.includes\(c\)\); if\(missing.length\) console.log\('Missing CSS:', missing\); else console.log\('All CSS classes present. Lines:', css.split\('\\n'\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const css = fs.readFileSync\('src/index.css','utf8'\); const checks = ['.db-shell','.db-kpis','.db-bars','.db-log','.impact-kpis','.impact-grid','.impact-tag','.flow-diagram','.flow-node','.final-cta-section','.hero-stats-note']; const missing = checks.filter\(c => !css.includes\(c\)\); if\(missing.length\) console.log\('Missing CSS:', missing\); else console.log\('All CSS present. Total lines:', css.split\('\\n'\).length\);")
